calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-27-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Michael J. Estrada, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Vasquez Estrada & Dumont, a California Limited Liability Partnership.
John Charnon, Financial Controller for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Todd-Ford, Inc., a Texas corporation.
Default was entered against defendant on April 3, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 1, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Vasquez Estrada & Dumont, a California Limited Liability Partnership, and against the Defaulted Defendant Todd-Ford, Inc., a Texas corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal - $46,472.63.
Costs - $334.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $46,806.63.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
